title: Green Thumb Industries Inc Q1 2023 Earnings and Revenues Lag Estimates
text: Green Thumb Industries delivered close to $250 million of revenue and over $76 million in adjusted EBITDA in the first quarter of 2023. Revenues were $248.54 million for the quarter ended March 2023, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 0.21%. GTBIF came out with quarterly earnings of $0.04 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.06 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.12 per share a year ago. The company generated over $75 million in cash flow from operations, solidifying its strong capital position. The company faced pricing compression, inflationary pressure on input costs, lack of progress in DC and limited access to capital. Despite these challenges, the company maintained operational efficiency and cost discipline.
